examples: Law enforcement officials had definitively identified Blanco as a potential suspect.
I think, personally speaking, that we need some further research before we can definitively say whether it helps or not.
When asked to make simple perceptual decisions such as matching a shape to its rotated image, for example, people often choose a definitively wrong answer if they see others doing the same.
But this can only be definitively done at post mortem by examining the brain.
Your dentist can tell you definitively if you grind your teeth at night or not.
